rationale: Review 2's fixes (remove confirmed-dead AlgPoints at ~44, switch to minimal .Basic import for IsAlgClosed) are verifiable against the diff, uncontroversial, and would leave cleaner code; Review 1's placement demands (split layers/files per unshown roadmap, change dir AlgebraicGroup->Algebra/AlgebraicGroup, move IsUnipotent) rest on unconfirmable external assumptions and risk substantial rework that may not improve (or even match intent of) this starter PR.
